best.explanation: Almagreira looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 24 kJ, 5 s period, lully 1/100, and wind is the main risk.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered; 6-9s at mid tide can make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia sharp and rippable, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
best.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label Rare window, Low confidence · 0.3-0.6 m · 24 kJ · 5 s period · 6-9s at mid tide can make exposed beaches like Belgas / Almagreira / Cerro / Meio da Baia sharp and rippable · wind is the main risk · Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.
warnings: wind angle is poor for this spot

ranked.explanation: Belgas looks like a small north coast window for Rare window, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 34 kJ, 10 s period, lully 3/100, and wind is the main risk.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; wind angle is poor for this spot.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0-0.3 m, 18 kJ, 9 s period, lully 0/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; Supertubos looks below your bodyboard fun size.

ranked.explanation: Molhe Leste looks like a small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0-0.3 m, 18 kJ, 9 s period, lully 1/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A jetty-shaped beach break with punchy rights and lefts; this is best for sheltered power when Supertubos has too much size.  Watch: Surfline consistency is lully; spot surf looks too small; 6-9s at mid tide stays weak and soft for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; Molhe Leste looks below your bodyboard fun size.
